title: Battle Horn-class bulk cruiser
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Battle Horn''-class bulk cruiser}} {{StarshipClass |image= |name=''Battle Horn''-class bulk cruiser |designer= |manufacturer=[[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]]''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' |line= |model= |type=[[Bulk cruiser/Legends|Bulk cruiser]]{{CSWECite|I|64|''Battle Horn''-class bulk cruiser}} |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=Equipped |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role= |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|What's wrong with the Rendili ''Battle Horn''-class? It's got the size you want, it's got the speed—''"
"''It's a freighter.''"
"''It's a bulk cruiser, not a freighter. It's armed, it's armored, it's got the range, it's got the capacity—|Jinzler suggesting a ''Battle Horn'' cruiser to Tarkosa before being interrupted by [[Bearsh]]|}} The '''''Battle Horn''-class bulk cruiser''' was a model of [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] manufactured by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]], and was named for the ''[[Battle Horn]]'', a famous Rendili [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. When [[Dean Jinzler]] was suggesting a list of ships the [[Colonists|group]] of [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|survivors]] of the [[Outbound Flight Project]] could use to leave the [[Unidentified planetoid (The Redoubt)|planetoid]] on [[The Redoubt/Legends|The Redoubt]], he suggested a ''Battle Horn''-class ship, but [[Brace Tarkosa]] and [[Chas Uliar]] turned it down. ==Appearances== *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bulk cruiser classes]] [[Category:Rendili StarDrive products]]
